name: Macaroni Hot Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the lean ground beef and onion together until no longer pink.
2. Drain off any excess fat from the beef mixture.
3. In a 1½ quart casserole dish, combine the browned beef, macaroni, cream of chicken soup, and cream of mushroom soup.
4. Cover the casserole with its lid.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until heated through.
6. Makes 4-6 servings.
